config.name: rsa_adaptive-latest_transform
config.lua_code:
-- SentinelOne Parser: rsa_adaptive-latest 
-- OCSF Class: Authentication (3002)
-- Performance Level: High-volume optimized
-- Generated: 2025-10-13T12:30:38.959223

-- Pre-declare locals for performance
local type = type
local tonumber = tonumber
local os_time = os.time
local string_format = string.format

-- Constants
local OCSF_CLASS = {
    UID = 3002,
    NAME = "Authentication",
    CATEGORY_UID = 3, 
    CATEGORY_NAME = "Identity & Access Management"
}

-- Validation helper functions
local function validate_timestamp(ts)
    if not ts then return nil end
    local num = tonumber(ts)
    return num and num > 0 and num or nil
end

local function validate_record(record)
    if not record or type(record) ~= "table" then
        return false, "Invalid input record"
    end
    if not record.unmapped then
        return false, "Missing unmapped data"
    end
    return true
end

function transform(record)
    -- Input validation with detailed error
    local valid, err = validate_record(record)
    if not valid then
        return nil, string_format("Validation failed: %s", err)
    end

    -- Initialize output with OCSF compliance
    local output = {
        -- OCSF Classification
        class_uid = OCSF_CLASS.UID,
        class_name = OCSF_CLASS.NAME,
        category_uid = OCSF_CLASS.CATEGORY_UID,
        category_name = OCSF_CLASS.CATEGORY_NAME,
        
        -- Default fields
        activity_id = 1,
        type_uid = 300201,
        metadata = {
            version = "1.0.0",
            product = {
                name = "Adaptive Authentication",
                vendor_name = "RSA"
            }
        }
    }

    -- Timestamp transformation with validation
    local timestamp = validate_timestamp(record.unmapped.timestamp)
    if timestamp then
        output.time = timestamp
    else
        -- Fallback to current time if invalid
        output.time = os_time() * 1000
        output.time_error = "Used fallback timestamp"
    end

    -- Additional field mappings can be added here
    -- Example: output.field = transform_field(record.field)

    -- Final validation
    if not output.time then
        return nil, "Critical: Failed to set valid timestamp"
    end

    -- Add observability metadata
    output._observo = {
        parser_version = "1.0.0",
        parser_id = "rsa_adaptive-latest",
        processing_time = os_time()
    }

    return output
end

-- Error recovery function
local function safe_transform(record)
    local success, result = pcall(transform, record)
    if not success then
        return nil, string_format("Transform error: %s", result)
    end
    return result
end

-- Export functions
return {
    transform = safe_transform,
    _testing = {
        validate_timestamp = validate_timestamp,
        validate_record = validate_record
    }
}
